description: MCP server for CDEK delivery service API — create orders, track shipments, search delivery points
name: io.github.dontsovcmc/cdek

environmentVariables.description: Sender company name (can also be set via config_set tool)
environmentVariables.name: CDEK_SENDER_COMPANY

environmentVariables.description: Sender short name (can also be set via config_set tool)
environmentVariables.name: CDEK_SENDER_NAME

environmentVariables.description: Sender full name (can also be set via config_set tool)
environmentVariables.name: CDEK_SENDER_FULL_NAME

environmentVariables.description: Sender email (can also be set via config_set tool)
environmentVariables.name: CDEK_SENDER_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: Sender phone (can also be set via config_set tool)
environmentVariables.name: CDEK_SENDER_PHONE

environmentVariables.description: My PVZ code for returns (can also be set via config_set tool)
environmentVariables.name: CDEK_MY_PVZ
